symptoms: Smooth vibration pattern with low amplitude. No abnormal frequency peaks.
spectrogram_pattern: Uniform low-energy spectrogram without prominent frequency bands or impulse patterns.
root_cause: No fault present — bearing is operating within normal parameters.
recommended_action: No action required. Continue routine monitoring per maintenance schedule.

symptoms: Slight increase in vibration amplitude. Faint high-frequency impulses in the signal.
spectrogram_pattern: Weak periodic impulse bands in the spectrogram at ball spin frequency and harmonics.
root_cause: Early-stage pitting or spalling on the rolling element surface, possibly from fatigue or contamination.
recommended_action: Schedule inspection at next planned downtime. Increase monitoring frequency. Check lubricant condition.
similar_cases: Ball_014 (same location, higher severity), other early-stage rolling element faults.

symptoms: Noticeable vibration increase. Clear impulsive patterns in signal. Audible noise possible.
spectrogram_pattern: Distinct periodic impulse bands at ball spin frequency with visible harmonics and sidebands.
root_cause: Progressive pitting/spalling on ball surface. Defect has grown from initial stage.
recommended_action: Plan bearing replacement within next maintenance window. Monitor closely for rapid degradation.

symptoms: High vibration amplitude. Strong impulsive patterns. Elevated temperature possible. Audible noise.
spectrogram_pattern: Strong broadband energy with prominent impulse patterns. Multiple harmonics of ball spin frequency clearly visible.
root_cause: Advanced spalling/material loss on rolling element. Risk of secondary damage to races.
recommended_action: Replace bearing immediately. Inspect races and cage for secondary damage. Analyze lubricant for debris.
similar_cases: Ball_014 (previous stage), any severe rolling element fault in similar bearing types.

symptoms: Slight vibration increase modulated at shaft speed. Low-level impulses at inner race defect frequency (BPFI).
spectrogram_pattern: Faint impulse lines at BPFI with amplitude modulation at shaft rotation frequency.
root_cause: Early-stage pitting on inner race surface, possibly from fatigue, misalignment, or inadequate lubrication.
recommended_action: Schedule inspection. Check shaft alignment and lubrication. Increase monitoring frequency.
similar_cases: IR_014 (same location, higher severity), other inner race faults in similar bearings.

symptoms: Clear vibration increase with amplitude modulation. Distinct impulses at BPFI and harmonics.
spectrogram_pattern: Clear BPFI harmonics with shaft-speed modulation sidebands visible in the spectrogram.
root_cause: Progressive inner race spalling. Defect growing due to continued operation.
recommended_action: Plan replacement. Investigate root cause (misalignment, overload, contamination). Check adjacent components.

symptoms: High vibration with strong modulation. Broadband energy increase. Possible temperature rise.
spectrogram_pattern: Strong BPFI harmonics with wide sidebands. Elevated broadband noise floor in spectrogram.
root_cause: Advanced inner race damage with significant material loss. High risk of catastrophic failure.
recommended_action: Immediate replacement required. Full inspection of shaft, housing, and adjacent bearings. Root cause analysis mandatory.
similar_cases: IR_014 (previous stage), any severe inner race fault.

symptoms: Low-level impulses at outer race defect frequency (BPFO). Vibration slightly elevated.
spectrogram_pattern: Faint periodic impulse lines at BPFO. No significant amplitude modulation.
root_cause: Early-stage pitting on outer race, commonly in the load zone. May be caused by static overload or contamination.
recommended_action: Schedule inspection. Verify mounting and load conditions. Check for contamination ingress.
similar_cases: OR_014 (same location, higher severity), other outer race faults.

symptoms: Clear impulses at BPFO with harmonics. Noticeable vibration increase during loaded operation.
spectrogram_pattern: Distinct BPFO harmonics visible. Energy concentrated at characteristic outer race frequencies.
root_cause: Progressive outer race spalling in load zone. Defect propagation from initial fault.
recommended_action: Plan replacement. Inspect housing bore for damage. Check for proper fit and loading.

symptoms: High vibration amplitude. Strong impulsive signal at BPFO with many harmonics. Noise and heat.
spectrogram_pattern: Strong broadband excitation with dominant BPFO pattern. Wide frequency spread indicating advanced damage.
root_cause: Severe outer race damage with extensive spalling. Risk of cage failure and complete bearing seizure.
recommended_action: Immediate replacement. Inspect housing, shaft, and seals. Full root cause analysis. Review maintenance schedule.
similar_cases: OR_014 (previous stage), any severe outer race fault in similar applications.
